assertions: reads both notificationType AND Configuration-Set eventType shapes
extracts sesMessageId from mail.messageId + resolver fields
malformed -> unknown -> handler failure not silent drop
MIN_SENT_FOR_RATE guard (don't suspend on tiny sample)
falls back configurationSetName -> by:config_set DB lookup
none when no field -> handler fails not guess
NEVER trusts recipient/client-supplied id; sender-side only
buildEmailEventInsert binds workspace_id $1, ON CONFLICT (workspace_id,ses_message_id,type) DO NOTHING
buildSuppressionUpsert binds $1 ON CONFLICT (workspace_id,email) DO NOTHING
buildGlobalHardBounceUpsert ON CONFLICT (email) DO NOTHING cross-workspace
rate/count queries bind workspace_id $1 read email_events+messages_log
buildWorkspaceSuspend UPDATE workspaces status=suspended WHERE id=$1
hard bounce plan: email_events + suppression hard_bounce + profile bounced + global_hard_bounces
complaint plan: email_events + suppression complaint + profile complained, NO global
soft below N: email_events only NO suppression
unresolved workspace -> empty plan + unresolved signal
same ses_message_id twice -> no net new writes (ON CONFLICT)
unresolved/malformed -> batch item failure not silent drop, others processed
reputation policing invoked per affected workspace not globally
hard bounce -> one suppressions hard_bounce + profiles bounced + global_hard_bounces row + email_events
complaint -> suppression complaint + profiles complained, NO global, email_events
all rows resolved workspace_id, nothing under other workspace
A and B both have profile for shared email
hard bounce: global_hard_bounces makes query true in BOTH, but per-workspace suppressions only in A
OFFENDER + HEALTHY workspaces with messages_log denominator + email_events
reputation policing reads rate from email_events+messages_log per workspace
same hard-bounce ses_message_id twice -> one suppressions, one global, one email_events row
different ses_message_id same email -> second email_events but still one suppressions (PK workspace_id,email)
N-1 distinct soft bounces -> N-1 email_events, NO suppression
count per-workspace (other workspace's soft bounce doesn't advance)
replay duplicate ses_message_id doesn't advance count
suppression stmt binds workspace_id $1 reason=unsubscribe source one-click
GET/non-one-click per policy, never writes other workspace
later B unsubscribe -> independent second row
replay idempotent ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING single A row
cross-check Phase-7 buildIsSuppressedQuery A true B false

mocks: Synthetic SNS notification payloads (Bounce Permanent/Transient, Complaint, Delivery/Open/Click) as Records[].Sns.Message JSON strings
Injected reader + runInWorkspaceTx + now() clock deps; integration injects adminPool-backed reader + runStatementsInWorkspaceTx
NOT mocked: Postgres in integration tier (real localhost:5433)
implUnits: 1. migration 0007: UNIQUE index email_events(workspace_id,ses_message_id,type) for idempotency; confirm suppressions PK (workspace_id,email) + global_hard_bounces PK (email) exist

2. services/feedback/src/core.ts pure (classifySesEvent,extractRecipients,resolveWorkspaceRef,shouldSuppressSoftBounce,decideReputation+constants, all SqlStatement builders, throw on falsy workspaceId)

3. services/feedback/src/feedback.ts orchestrator buildFeedbackPlan + handleNotification (resolve workspace tag->config_set->identity via reader, resolve profile by (workspace,email), commit plan via runInWorkspaceTx, then reputation policing for that workspace)
4. services/feedback/src/handler.ts thin SNS handler (parse Records[].Sns.Message, per-record try/catch->batch failure, never throw)
5. services/feedback/src/deps.ts makeProdDeps (pooled reader + runStatementsInWorkspaceTx + now); replace placeholder
6. services/unsubscribe/src/core.ts parseUnsubscribeRequest + buildUnsubscribeSuppression (reason=unsubscribe ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING), honor List-Unsubscribe-Post
7. services/unsubscribe/src/handler.ts+deps.ts thin handler scoping by workspace_id from link; replace placeholder
notes: Order: migration first (idempotency meaningful), then pure core (unblocks unit red->green), orchestrator, handlers, deps. Workspace resolution: NO workspace_id in SES payload -> resolve sender-side ONLY in priority: (a) mail.tags.workspace_id set at send time, (b) per-workspace Configuration Set name (sending_identity->>config_set) DB lookup, (c) sending identity/from-domain (sending_identity->>from_domain). Unresolved -> batch failure, never guessed/default (invariant 2). Idempotency key = mail.messageId in email_events.ses_message_id; UNIQUE (workspace_id,ses_message_id,type) + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING -> re-delivered SNS no-op; suppressions PK (workspace_id,email), global_hard_bounces PK (email) natural idempotency. Suppression scoping: per-workspace isolated A-vs-B; global_hard_bounces documented cross-workspace exception (hard bounce blocks everywhere via buildIsSuppressedQuery global arm); AC2 asserts both. Auto-suspend: rates per-workspace from email_events numerator + messages_log denominator + MIN_SENT_FOR_RATE guard; suspend ONLY offender; healthy unchanged. Reuse SqlStatement, runStatementsInWorkspaceTx/runPlanInWorkspaceTx, adminPool/hasDatabaseUrl skipIf, buildIsSuppressedQuery from dispatcher for Phase-7 cross-check. Service-role paths scope by workspace_id in code, tests on adminPool. Mock SES/SNS at synthetic-payload boundary only; never mock Postgres. Thresholds named constants: bounce ~5% critical, complaint ~0.1%; soft N default 3 asserted.
